profile.name: Dhivyan Sree D
profile.tagline: IT undergrad building AI-powered mobile & full-stack tools

education.school: Government Boys Higher Secondary School, Sankarapuram

projects.name: Krishi Dost
projects.subtitle: AI-Based Crop Recommendation System — Smart India Hackathon 2025
points: Built an AI-powered smart farming app that gives crop recommendations, soil analysis, and disease detection for farmers.
Shipped on-device image classification for early crop disease detection, cutting inference time and keeping the app usable offline.
Built RESTful APIs in Python to process soil and environmental data in real time and turn it into recommendations farmers can act on.

projects.name: Statex
projects.subtitle: Smart Expense Tracker
points: Built full CRUD flows with search, filters, and category-wise tracking on Spring Boot REST APIs backed by MySQL.
Designed an analytics dashboard charting monthly spending trends and category-wise breakdowns.
Focused the UI on quick entry and at-a-glance insight, so tracking expenses stays a 10-second habit, not a chore.

achievements.title: SIH 2025 Grand Finale Finalist
achievements.detail: Smart India Hackathon 2025 — reached the national grand finale.
